message:
Add snapshot summary panel to dashboard (bd-i8h2)

Implements Web UI: snapshot summary panel feature:
- useSnapshot hook: Fetches /system/snapshot with caching, polling,
  and mock mode support
- SnapshotSummaryPanel: Unified system status overview showing:
  - Overall health status with component breakdown (NTM, Mail, Beads, Tools)
  - Active agents with state, bead assignments, and last activity
  - Safety tools status (DCG, SLB, UBS)
  - Beads work queue summary (open, in progress, blocked, ready)
  - System issues and NTM alerts
- Integrates panel at top of Dashboard page

Definition of Done: Dashboard shows agents, tool health, beads, alerts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
